name: Prinsiri Public Company Limited
summary: Prinsiri Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, develops, leases, and sells real estate properties. The company develops housing estates and condominiums; and provides real estate services. It also provides entertainment park and education center services, as well as food service in restaurant and food shop. In addition, the company engages in the generation and distribution of electricity from solar cells and alternative energy. Prinsiri Public Company Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
